title: Atoz Kids Football Goal Set, Indoor & Outdoor Play, 52 x 32 x 32 cm, Includes Ball & Pump, Age 3+
features: VERSATILE PLAY: Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use, this football goal set provides endless entertainment for young sports enthusiasts aged 3 and above
COMPLETE SET: Includes everything needed to start playing - a football goal, ball, and pump for convenient setup and immediate play
COMPACT SIZE: Goal dimensions of 52 x 32 x 32 centimetres make it ideal for children's play areas while maintaining stability during active games
EASY ASSEMBLY: Simple setup process allows quick installation without complicated tools or procedures, getting children into the game faster
PORTABLE DESIGN: Lightweight construction allows for easy movement between indoor and outdoor play areas whilst remaining sturdy during use
description: Product Description Transform any space into a football arena with this versatile A to Z Sport Zone Football Goal Set! Perfect for both indoor and outdoor play, this compact goal measures 52 x 32 x 32 centimetres, making it ideal for young aspiring footballers aged 3 and above. The set comes complete with everything you need to start playing straight away, including a football and pump for convenient ball inflation. The goal features a sturdy construction with a white net and yellow corner supports, designed for easy assembly so children can quickly get into the action. Whether it's practising penalty shots in the garden or improving shooting accuracy in the playroom, this football goal set provides endless hours of active entertainment. The portable size allows for quick setup and storage, while being robust enough to withstand enthusiastic play. Perfect for developing coordination, sporting skills and encouraging physical activity in a fun, engaging way. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts
